prompt_text: Power grasp a small imaginary object and release.
Perform a precise thumb-index pinch and hold briefly.
Open the hand fully, then close into a relaxed fist.
Spread all fingers apart, hold briefly, then relax.
Tap the index finger downward twice in the air.
Sweep the thumb across the palm from open to closed.
Form a tripod pinch as if lifting a tiny object.
Curl the fingers into a hook grip and pull back slightly.
Wave the fingers one by one from index to little finger.
Rotate the palm outward and return to neutral.
Touch the thumb and index finger to form a circle, then release.
Roll the fingertips inward from index to little finger.
